title: Credit Card Payoff Calculator — TheDailyo
subtitle: Estimate payoff time, total interest, and the impact of extra payments.
description: Estimate how long it takes to pay off a credit card balance, total interest paid, and how extra payments change the payoff timeline.
howItWorksHtml: Each month, interest is added to the current balance using a monthly rate (APR ÷ 12). Your payment then reduces the balance. Adding extra payments reduces both payoff time and interest.

faq.q: Why does it say “not paid off”?
faq.a: If your payment is too low to reduce the balance (often when it barely covers interest), the payoff can take an extremely long time. Increase the payment or add extra to model a payoff plan.

faq.q: Does this include fees or a changing APR?
faq.a: No. Fees, promo rates, and daily compounding can change real results. Use this as a clean estimate, then compare to your statement.
No—this is educational. Consider a professional for decisions with big consequences.
